reference: https://openkim.org/id/SW_BereSerra_2006_GaN__MO_861114678890_000
notes: Stillinger-Weber (Bere & Serra, 2006); pulled by KIM API at runtime; CONFIRMED on openkim.org

reference: Nord et al., J. Phys.: Condens. Matter 15 (2003) 5649
notes: Tersoff parameters for Ga-N; placed locally, currently unused (KIM SW preferred)
Quaternary oxide with rare-earth Gd; no KIM model and no published classical potential covering Ca-Gd-Al-O simultaneously. Use DFT-MD.
Quaternary oxide with Y; Lewis/Catlow Buckingham parameters exist for individual Ca-O, Y-O, Al-O pairs but not jointly fitted; no KIM model. Recommend DFT-MD.
Borate (BBO); no KIM model, no widely validated classical potential for B-O network in this anisotropic phase. Use DFT-MD.
CLBO borate; no KIM coverage of Cs-Li-B-O, no published transferable classical potential. Use DFT-MD.
Lu-Al borate (huntite-type); rare-earth + borate, no classical potential or KIM model. Use DFT-MD.

reference: https://openkim.org/id/Tersoff_LAMMPS_ErhartAlbe_2005_SiC__MO_903987585848_005
notes: Erhart-Albe Tersoff for Si-C; CONFIRMED v005 on openkim.org; MP id is for hexagonal/2H polytype - parameters fit cubic 3C primarily, verify phase before production

reference: Vashishta et al., J. Appl. Phys. 101, 103515 (2007)
notes: Vashishta 3-body for SiC; downloaded from lammps/lammps github (potentials/SiC.vashishta, dated 2015-10-14); local file present

reference: Raiteri, Gale, Quigley, Rodger, J. Phys. Chem. C 114, 5997 (2010)
notes: Raiteri-Gale rigid-ion Buckingham + intramolecular CO3; not in KIM. FILE PENDING - manual extraction from paper / GULP library required.

reference: Walker, Dixon, Gillan, J. Phys. C 15, 4061 (1982); Catlow et al.
notes: Buckingham rigid-ion fit for LaF3 tysonite; no KIM model. FILE PENDING - manual extraction from 1982 paper required.
LiCAF; mixed Li-Ca-Al-F system, no consistent classical fit, no KIM model. Use DFT-MD.

reference: Catlow, Norgett, Ross, J. Phys. C 10, 1627 (1977)
notes: Rigid-ion Buckingham for rutile-type MgF2; no KIM model verified. FILE PENDING - manual extraction from 1977 paper.

reference: Chernyshev et al., Phys. Solid State 39 (1997); various Y-F, Li-F Buckingham fits
notes: Composite Buckingham (Y-F + Li-F); transferability uncertain. FILE PENDING - composite fit from multiple sources, error-prone.
Lead germanate; no KIM model, no transferable classical potential for Pb-Ge-O ferroelectric phase. Use DFT-MD.
Lithium iodate; iodate (IO3) molecular anion not parametrized in standard MD potentials, no KIM model. Use DFT-MD.
Scheelite; no KIM model, no widely used classical potential for Mo-O in tetrahedral MoO4 group with full transferability. Use DFT-MD (or develop bespoke shell model).
Wulfenite scheelite; same situation as CaMoO4 plus Pb adds difficulty. Use DFT-MD.
Scheelite; no classical potential or KIM model. Use DFT-MD.

reference: Vashishta, Kalia, Nakano, Rino, J. Appl. Phys. 109, 033514 (2011)
notes: Vashishta 3-body for AlN; NOT on KIM (verified) and NOT in lammps/potentials/ (only SiC, SiO, InP ship with LAMMPS). FILE PENDING - manual extraction from 2011 paper Table II required.

reference: https://openkim.org/id/Tersoff_LAMMPS_KinaciHaskinsSevik_2012_BNC__MO_105008013807_000
notes: Kinaci-Haskins-Sevik 2012 Tersoff for B-N-C; CONFIRMED on openkim.org. Albe-Moeller/Sekkal not on KIM. Populate only B and N atoms; works for cubic and hexagonal BN.
Ferroelectric perovskite-like; Jackson-Catlow shell model exists (J. Phys. C 1988) but standard LAMMPS pair_style does not support shell models out-of-box without core/shell drudes. Recommend DFT-MD.

reference: Matsui, Mineral. Mag. 58A, 571 (1994)
notes: Matsui Buckingham for corundum; backup of kim row. FILE PENDING.

reference: https://openkim.org/id/Sim_LAMMPS_SMTBQ_SallesPolitanoAmzallag_2016_AlO__SM_853967355976_000
notes: Salles-Politano-Amzallag 2016 SMTBQ (charge-EQ) for Al-O; SIMULATOR model - load via 'kim init' which sets up pair_style smtbq. CONFIRMED on openkim.org. Alt non-EQ: Sim_LAMMPS_Buckingham_SunStirnerHagston_2006_AlO__SM_466046725502_000.
Wurtzite BeO; very limited classical potential literature, no production-grade KIM model verified. Use DFT-MD.
SCAM substrate; quaternary Sc-Al-Mg-O, no KIM model, no published classical potential. Use DFT-MD.

reference: van Beest, Kramer, van Santen, Phys. Rev. Lett. 64, 1955 (1990)
notes: BKS Buckingham for silica; backup of kim row. Better than Munetoh Tersoff for optical work. FILE PENDING.

reference: https://openkim.org/id/Tersoff_LAMMPS_MunetohMotookaMoriguchi_2007_SiO__MO_501246546792_000
notes: Munetoh-Motooka-Moriguchi 2007 Tersoff for Si-O; CONFIRMED on openkim.org. Less accurate for elastic/optical of alpha-quartz than BKS - prefer BKS local for optical work.
Paratellurite; lone-pair Te makes classical potentials difficult; no production KIM model, limited literature (Pietrucci shell model exists but not in vanilla LAMMPS). Use DFT-MD.

reference: Matsui, Akaogi, Mol. Simul. 6, 239 (1991)
notes: Matsui-Akaogi Buckingham; same parameters as KIM SM row. Redundant; FILE PENDING (low priority).

notes: Gale Buckingham for berlinite AlPO4. FILE PENDING - check GULP library.

notes: KDP; full ReaxFF .reax file (100s of params) needed. FILE PENDING - DFT-MD likely preferable.

notes: ADP; same situation as KDP. FILE PENDING - DFT-MD likely preferable.
Chalcopyrite; no KIM model, no transferable classical potential for Ag-Ga-S ternary. Use DFT-MD.

reference: https://openkim.org/id/SW_ZhouWardMartin_2013_CdTeZnSeHgS__MO_503261197030_002
notes: Zhou-Ward-Martin 2013 SW for II-VI semiconductors; species set CdTeZnSeHgS (includes Hg); CONFIRMED on openkim.org. Populate only Cd and S atoms in the data file.
Defect chalcopyrite; no KIM model, no classical potential for Cd-Ga-S ternary. Use DFT-MD.
Layered GaS; some Ga-S Tersoff parameters in literature but unreliable for layered phase, no production KIM model verified. Use DFT-MD.
Ferroelectric LN-isostructural; same situation as LiNbO3 - shell model exists but not standard LAMMPS. Use DFT-MD.

Ferroelectric perovskite; Tinte/Sepliarsky shell models published but require core-shell drudes not in vanilla LAMMPS pair_style. Some bond-valence models exist (Liu, Cohen 2013 - bond-valence model in LAMMPS via pair_style bv) - verify. Recommend DFT-MD.
Ferroelectric perovskite; same as BaTiO3 - shell models published but not in standard LAMMPS. Bond-valence (Shin-Cohen-Grinberg) implementation exists but specialized. Recommend DFT-MD.
Zircon-type vanadate; no KIM model, no widely used classical potential for V-O in VO4 tetrahedra with Y. Use DFT-MD.
Scheelite tungstate; no KIM model, no production classical potential for W-O in WO4. Use DFT-MD.
